project_type: TypeScript monorepo - Quant Ecosystem platform with multiple packages
language: TypeScript (strict mode, ES2022 target, ESNext modules)
build_system: pnpm workspaces + turbo for task orchestration. Packages use 'type: module' with .ts extension imports.
test_framework: Vitest ^2 with globals enabled (describe, it, expect, vi imported from 'vitest'). Tests co-located or in __tests__ dirs.
verification_instructions: 1. Run NODE_OPTIONS="" npx vitest run to execute all tests. 2. Run npx tsc --noEmit in packages/federation to typecheck.
setup_instructions: pnpm install in root. Packages are workspace-linked via workspace:* protocol.
environment_constraints: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network mode - can install from npm registry. No Docker daemon available for container tests. Node >=22.0.0 available.
contribution_requirements: Conventional commits. TypeScript strict (no any). Zod for schemas. Every new file gets .test.ts. Use node:crypto for cryptographic operations.
key_patterns: Packages follow pattern: package.json with name @quant/<name>, main/types pointing to src/index.ts, scripts: typecheck + test. tsconfig.json extends root. Dependencies: zod for validation, pino for logging, @quant/common for shared types. Tests use vitest describe/it/expect/vi pattern. Classes with dependency injection. Barrel exports from index.ts.
directory_structure: Root: apps/, packages/, services/, infra/. New package goes in packages/federation/. Each package has: package.json, tsconfig.json, src/ with index.ts barrel, source files, and test files (either co-located .test.ts or in __tests__/).
